naming/vo-suffix.description: vo 包下的类名必须以 RequestVO 或 ResponseVO 结尾

naming/no-dto.description: 类名中不允许出现 dto（统一使用 VO/BO 命名）

api/summary-length.description: @Operation summary 长度不能超过 maxLength 个字符

api/summary-banned-word.description: @Operation summary 中不能出现违禁词

interface/id-naming.description: Controller 方法中的 ID 类参数命名必须使用 id 或 parentId

model/field-comment.description: vo / entity 包内的字段必须有注释或 @Schema

model/package-structure.description: model 包下只允许出现 vo / bo / enums / entity 子包，不允许独立 java 文件或其它子包

vo/field-schema.description: vo 字段必须使用 @Schema 作为首个注解，且不允许出现裸注释

enum/base-enum.description: enums 包下的枚举必须实现 BaseEnum 接口

converter/single-param.description: Converter 方法的入参数量不允许超过 maxParameters

converter/name-format.description: Converter 公开方法的方法名必须以指定前缀开头

vo/use-converter.description: Manual get/set mapping between VO/Entity in service package is disallowed; use a Converter instead (tests are exempt).

service/complex-lambda.description: service 中 LambdaWrapper 的链式调用长度不允许超过 maxWrapperChainLength，超过应拆分到 mapper XML

service/interface-docs.description: service 包内的接口方法必须有 Javadoc，且参数 / 返回值 / 异常都要在 Javadoc 中声明

service/public-method-comment.description: service 包内的所有公开方法都必须有注释

mapper/no-inline-sql.description: Mapper classes must not contain inline SQL annotations (@Select/@Insert/@Update/@Delete); put SQL into mapper XML instead.

mapper/short-query.description: Short single-table mapper XML select queries should be replaced with LambdaWrapper or built-in MyBatis-Plus methods

naming/package-no-multi-word.description: Package segments must not contain underscores or multi-word separators (e.g. 'private_space').

model/entity-no-schema.description: Entity classes and fields must not use @Schema annotations; document via DTO/VO or DB schema instead.

sql/file-naming.description: sql/mysql 目录下只允许出现初始化 SQL 与符合命名约定的迁移 SQL

duplication/block.description: 检测连续 minLines 行（去除注释/包导入/纯括号噪声后）跨文件重复的代码块

size/file-length.description: 单个 .java 文件的总行数不允许超过 maxLines

size/class-length.description: 单个类 / 接口 / 枚举的源代码行数不允许超过 maxLines

size/method-length.description: 单个方法的源代码行数不允许超过 maxLines
